title: meconopsis × decora
intro: Meconopsis × decora, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross-breeding of Meconopsis betonicifolia and Meconopsis superba, is a species of flowering plant commonly known as the Himalayan blue poppy. This plant is known for its vibrant blue flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Meconopsis × decora include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Meconopsis × decora can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
